top_signals.title: Peter Kyle vows state will take bigger stakes in Britain’s next tech giants
top_signals.summary: The government is preparing to take larger stakes in Britain’s fastest-growing companies as Peter Kyle ramps up Labour’s efforts to turn the state into a more active backer of private enterprise. Ahead of London Tech Week, the business secretary said ministers would become more willing to deploy taxpayer money alongside private investors, arguing that government [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
